aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are likely to cite CAI Home Inspection & Engineering due to their strong local presence and reviews, but improvements in structured data and conversational content are needed for higher visibility.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema markup with detailed service information.
Expand FAQ content to address common customer queries using natural language.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating, photos, and accurate hours, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
Q&A section is not actively managed.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any discrepancies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: Missing FAQPage schema despite existing FAQ content.
No HowTo schema for detailed service processes.
LocalBusiness schema lacks detailed service descriptions and geo-coordinates.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of detailed structured data limits AI's ability to fully understand and cite their services.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to detailed service processes and unique selling propositions.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema to leverage existing FAQ content.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, expertise, and unique service offerings through structured data and content.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing your digital presence for answer engines.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their strong GBP rating and reviews are not fully leveraged in AI search due to lacking structured data.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach enhances their structured data, creates conversational content, and boosts authority signals to ensure AI models cite them as a top expert.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; acting now prevents losing market share.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Growth for CAI Home Inspection & Engineering
opening_line: We analyzed your website and Google Business Profile and identified key opportunities to enhance your AI visibility.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how our AEO strategy can position your business as the go-to expert in AI search.
page_title: CAI Home Inspection & Engineering - Home Inspectors & Structural Engineers in Ohio and North Carolina
